data.reasoningText:
Now I need to:
1. Create a `Directory.Packages.props` file in the solution root (`simple-single-project/`) with `ManagePackageVersionsCentrally` set to true and all package versions listed there.
2. Update `MyApp.csproj` to remove `Version` attributes from `PackageReference` elements.

Let me also check if there's already a `Directory.Packages.props` file.

data.content: No existing `Directory.Packages.props`. I'll create it and update the `.csproj`.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" Version="9.0.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Polly" Version="8.5.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="9.0.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

    <PackageReference Include="Polly" Version="8.5.0" />
  </ItemGroup>
